story_source.background: 現在の `traceability.json` は、merged Storyに対してPR body、Gate DAG、 verification evidence、merge artifactの存在を列挙できる。しかし2026-06-22の価値監査では、 最新Storyのtraceabilityが実質的にartifact一覧であり、 Acceptance CriteriaやScenario clauseがどの変更ファイル、どのテスト、どのreview evidenceで 満たされたのかを再構成できなかった。 senior engineerが欲しいtraceabilityは「artifactがある」ではない。 「このACはこのコード変
acceptance_criteria: `scenario_clauses[]` が存在する場合、各scenario clauseも同じ対応表に含める。
ACやscenario clauseに対応する changed file / test / verification evidence が無い場合、
`mapped evidence` は単なるcommand文字列ではなく、current-boundか、artifact quality、
PR body / Gate DAG / usage report は、unmapped ACの件数と代表例を表示する。
generic test passやbroad suiteだけで全ACを満たした扱いにしない。
回帰テストは、artifact一覧だけ存在するStory、AC-to-test対応があるStory、

architecture_sources.content:
---
story_id: story-vibepro-traceability-ac-to-code-map
title: Traceability AC-to-code Map Architecture
---

# Architecture

## Decision

traceabilityをartifact presenceの一覧から、Acceptance Criteria / scenario clauseごとの
implementation and evidence mapへ拡張する。

各ACは、Story source、changed files、test targets、verification evidence、review findingsに
独立してbindingされる。bindingは強さを持ち、generic test passだけではfully mappedにしない。

## Mapping Sources

- Story frontmatter and Acceptance Criteria
- Spec scenario clauses
- changed files and file groups
- test files and explicit AC / scenario references
- verification evidence commands, observations, artifact checks
- review findings and finding dispositions

## Invariants

- artifact presence alone is not traceability
- unmapped or weakly mapped AC must remain visible
- traceability can inform value audit without directly blocking every PR

story_source.title: Traceabilityをartifact一覧からAC-to-code対応表へ引き上げる

invariants.text: traceability.json must include acceptance_criteria entries with stable ids, source text, status, mapped files, mapped tests, and mapped evidence.
When a Story acceptance criterion maps to changed files or evidence, pr prepare records the criterion as mapped in traceability.json.

diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  Story["Story AC / scenario clause"] --> Mapper["buildTraceabilityClauseMap"]
  Diff["changed files / tests"] --> Mapper
  Evidence["verification / PR artifacts"] --> Mapper
  Mapper --> Traceability["traceability.json AC-to-code map"]
  Traceability --> PRBody["PR body / Gate DAG / usage report"]
diagrams.rationale: The change adds a mapping workflow from Story clauses to code and evidence surfaces.

missing_scenario_clauses.statement: When a Story acceptance criterion maps to changed files or evidence, pr prepare records the criterion as mapped in traceability.json.

missing_acceptance_criteria.criterion: `traceability.json` は `acceptance_criteria[]` を持ち、
missing_acceptance_criteria.guidance: Use an explicit AC marker near an executable assertion, or a local static string/array binding referenced by that assertion. Avoid marker-only comments without an assertion.

parallel_dispatch.prepare_command: vibepro review prepare . --id story-vibepro-traceability-ac-to-code-map --stage gate --role gate_evidence

stage_execution.barrier: A later review stage must not be dispatched until the current stage has closed and recorded every required role.

required_stages.dispatch_rule: Run these roles in parallel only for this stage; after every role is closed and recorded, advance to next_stage.

decisions.summary: Split not required after scope review
decisions.reason: Splitting would obscure the review story because later commits directly close gate_evidence findings against the same Story and tests. Keep as one PR with explicit review history artifacts and current pass review.

decisions.summary: Scope reviewed as one PR for traceability mapping hardening
decisions.reason: All three commits are same-story follow-ups to the same traceability evidence contract: initial AC-to-code map, review-driven evidence hardening, and explicit clause target regression. Files are limited to traceability/pr-manager/usage-report and focused tests, so a single reviewer can evaluate the contract coherently.
